scripts.publish:dry: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @contractguard/core publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @contractguard/cli publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @contractguard/core publish --access public && pnpm --filter @contractguard/cli publish --access public
